input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.1.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.1.4
            TITLE: inspection sticker

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.1.4: Inspection Sticker
VE.1.4 Inspection Sticker 
The vehicle must have space for the Inspection Sticker(s) IN.13.2 that is: 
• A clear and unobstructed area, minimum 25 cm wide x 20 cm high 
• Located on the upper front surface of the nose along the vehicle centerline

final_answer: rule VE.1.4: Inspection Sticker VE.1.4 Inspection Sticker The vehicle must have space for the Inspection Sticker(s) IN.13.2 that is: • A clear and unobstructed area, minimum 25 cm wide x 20 cm high • Located on the upper front surface of the nose along the vehicle centerline
